page_metadata.biotools__summary: A fast, web-based tool for returning a subset of mmCIF coordinate data for a PDB entry held in the PDB archive. The server is able to return the specific portions of the structure that are relevant, as specified in your query
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A fast, web-based tool for returning a subset of mmCIF coordinate data for a PDB entry held in the PDB archive. The server is able to return the specific portions of the structure that are relevant, as specified in your query
